atten4.ptxt: A bolt without a torque specification is shown in the standard bolt chart. (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR BENCH TYPE SEAT BACK COVER

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install 20 new hog rings.
Using hog ring pliers, install the rear bench type seat back cover to the seat back frame (with pad) with 44 new hog rings.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT GUIDE LH
INSTALL REAR SEAT SHOULDER BELT GUIDE RH
INSTALL INNER CENTER SEAT ARMREST PLATE
INSTALL CENTER SEAT ARMREST BRACKET SUB-ASSEMBLY
INSTALL REAR BENCH TYPE SEAT CUSHION COVER

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install 14 new hog rings.
Using hog ring pliers, install the rear seat cushion cover to the rear seat cushion pad with 36 new hog rings.
